registry.note: Depends on the published crates.io Sekiban crates at exact =0.1.0 versions. Builds and runs today.

dev.note: Local build against the public GHCR runtime container. Vendors the monorepo-internal wasm-projectors/rust crates (sekiban-core, sekiban-derive, sekiban-mv, sekiban-wasm, sekiban-executor, domain) into vendor/ so the generated project is self-contained; builds and runs today.

registry.note: Depends on @sekiban/ts and @sekiban/as-wasm at exact npm 0.1.0 versions. Both packages are not published to npm yet (SWR-G058); npm install will fail with a 404 until they are.

dev.reason: No local-container dev-mode sample exists yet in the monorepo for TypeScript (only Rust's Sekiban.Dcb.WasmRuntime.PublicContainer.RsDecider provides this shape today) -- there is nothing to bundle. See docs/tools/create-sekiban-wasm.md.

registry.note: Requires the published Go subdirectory module github.com/J-Tech-Japan/SekibanWasmRuntime/src/lib/sekiban-go at v0.1.0. That tag is not published yet; go build will fail until it is.

dev.reason: No local-container dev-mode sample exists yet in the monorepo for Go (only Rust's Sekiban.Dcb.WasmRuntime.PublicContainer.RsDecider provides this shape today) -- there is nothing to bundle. See docs/tools/create-sekiban-wasm.md.

registry.note: Depends on the public github.com/J-Tech-Japan/sekiban-swift mirror at exact 0.1.0. Until that mirror is public, swift build will fail to resolve the dependency.

dev.reason: No local-container dev-mode sample exists yet in the monorepo for Swift (only Rust's Sekiban.Dcb.WasmRuntime.PublicContainer.RsDecider provides this shape today) -- there is nothing to bundle. See docs/tools/create-sekiban-wasm.md.

registry.note: Depends on sekiban/sekiban-wasm-runtime and sekiban/sekiban-client as mooncakes.io registry packages. Until those packages are published, moon check/build will fail to resolve them.

dev.reason: No local-container dev-mode sample exists yet in the monorepo for MoonBit (only Rust's Sekiban.Dcb.WasmRuntime.PublicContainer.RsDecider provides this shape today) -- there is nothing to bundle. See docs/tools/create-sekiban-wasm.md.
